Services

Automation, dashboards, and internal tools built around real operations.

Every service starts with the flow that matters most: where work enters, where it stalls, what data it creates, and what the team needs to trust.

Scope a project See case studies

Service overview

A narrow scope creates a stronger system.

These engagements are structured to produce a visible operational shift rather than a broad, vague feature list.

AI Workflow Automation

Route requests, approvals, reminders, and exceptions into one visible system.

Custom Dashboards

Give leaders the right numbers with clean hierarchy and trustworthy sources.

Internal Tools

Build compact apps for intake, QA, handoffs, and tracking.

CRM & Data Cleanup

Repair duplicate records, stale fields, and broken lifecycle stages.

WordPress Integrations

Connect the website to the systems your team already uses.

Reporting Systems

Automate weekly reporting so the story stays stable every cycle.

Detailed services

The right build shape depends on the system around it.

Some teams need automation first, others need data cleanup or a dashboard layer before any new tool can hold up.

Delivery

Workflow Automation

Map repeatable approvals, follow-ups, and exception handling into one reliable workflow.

  • Process map and source audit
  • Small release with visible owners
  • Documentation and support path

Delivery

Dashboards and Reporting

Build reporting systems that turn noisy operations into a clear daily and weekly rhythm.

  • Process map and source audit
  • Small release with visible owners
  • Documentation and support path

Delivery

Internal Tools and Integrations

Replace the patchwork with compact interfaces tied to the systems your team already uses.

  • Process map and source audit
  • Small release with visible owners
  • Documentation and support path

Comparison

AstraGrid vs. generic build requests.

The table below shows how the work is scoped when the goal is supportable operations instead of a one-off app.

StageAstraGrid approachTypical generic request
DiscoveryProcess map, data audit, risk listStakeholder wish list, no source review
AutomationRules, fallbacks, human checksBlack box that hides exceptions
ReportingStable metrics and clear ownersCharts with no data contract
SupportDocumentation, handoff, and maintenance planLaunch and hope

FAQ

What clients ask before they start.

A strong scope is usually more useful than a long list of features.

How do you choose the first automation?

We pick the path that repeats most often, creates the most follow-up, or breaks the dashboard the hardest.

Can you work with our existing CRM?

Yes. We usually repair the source records and field logic before suggesting a rebuild.

Will the team be able to own the system?

That is the goal. Every launch includes notes, owner names, and a maintenance path the operations team can follow.

Do you support WordPress integrations?

Yes. We connect sites to intake, reporting, and back-office systems without introducing CDN dependencies or remote scripts.

AstraGrid Systems

Move work out of spreadsheets and into a cleaner operating system.

We build premium automation, analytics, and internal tools for teams that need sharper decisions and steadier weekly operations.
